title: 11 Herbal Creams For Gastroparesis
description: Foeniculum vulgare creams contains a compound called anethole, which has been shown to have a relaxing effect on the muscles in the stomach. This relaxation can help improve digestion and reduce symptoms of gastroparesis, a condition where the stomach takes too long to empty its contents. Additionally, Foeniculum vulgare creams contain limonene and beta-pinene, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the stomach lining.
